title: Episode 1
overview: Mari is late to school one day and meets a new student who is also late named Tsunagu, who is a beastperson.

title: Episode 2
overview: Mari and Tsunagu test the boundaries of their relationship.

title: Episode 3
overview: Mari's friend Ayano starts to act strange when Tsunagu places top in their class academically.

title: Episode 4
overview: Mari, Tsunagu, and Yukihiro go out together on their day off.

title: Episode 5
overview: Mari, Tsunagu, and Yukihiro get ready for the annual sports festival.

title: Episode 6
overview: The sports festival at school finishes up and something surprising happens to Ochi.

title: Episode 7
overview: Mari and Yukihiro spend some time at the beach and then Mari goes to visit Tsunagu beyond the wall.

title: Episode 8
overview: Mari and Tsunagu spend some time together in the town of beastfolk.

title: Episode 9
overview: Mari has doubts that she's attractive and someone from the school paper wants to interview Tsunagu.

title: Episode 10
overview: The school festival begins and Kisara comes to visit.

title: Episode 11
overview: A photo of Tsunagu and Mari in a compromising situation gets leaked to the school.

title: Episode 12
overview: Will Tsunagu be able to return to school without any consequences?
